description_long: This object is a small residential house complex featuring several detached structures, each with a simple, boxy form and flat or low-pitched roofs. The main house is surrounded by a few outbuildings, including a carport, a cylindrical water tank, and a small shed, all set among scattered trees and shrubs. The buildings are predominantly white or light gray, with minimal ornamentation and a modern, utilitarian aesthetic. Windows are placed asymmetrically, and the main entryway is marked by a modest porch with a flat overhang. The landscaping includes a mix of deciduous and flowering trees, adding color and texture to the scene. The overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-urban residential setting with open space between structures.
description: A modern, minimalist house complex with several detached white buildings, flat roofs, and scattered trees. The layout is open, with simple landscaping and utilitarian features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, carport, water tank, and several trees and shrubs arranged in an open layout.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the main house, outbuildings, and a staircase leading to a raised platform.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the arrangement of the main house, carport, and outbuildings, with visible interior spaces and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, carport, and a clear view of the staircase and platform, with trees framing the scene.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and no decorative columns
